title_en: 基于STM32 ARM+FPGA伺服控制系统总体设计方案(一）
text:
Achieving precise, high-bandwidth motor control often means compromising on flexibility or scalability. What if you could have both, within a single integrated platform?

This post details a servo control system architecture blending ARM and FPGA for optimized performance and adaptability.

* ⚙️ **Integrated Drive & Control:** Single board solution for reduced footprint and complexity.
* ⚡ **Multi-Motor Support:** Drives two or more permanent magnet synchronous motors up to 1KW.
* 🔄 **Flexible Control Modes:** Accommodates single-loop, multi-loop hybrid, and custom algorithms.
* 📊 **Universal Encoder Compatibility:** Seamless integration with various digital encoder feedback types.
* 🎯 **Rigid & Rigid-Flexible Control:** Designed for both standard rigid and complex rigid-flexible coupled platforms.

This blend of ARM for supervisory control and FPGA for real-time, high-speed tasks addresses the need for both computational power and deterministic latency in demanding motion control applications.

Our team at JYTech has been building robust industrial control solutions on similar architectures through our Sienovo product line.

Full write-up: https://sienovo.jytech.us/blog/131730439

What are your biggest challenges in integrating real-time motion control systems today?
